# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - release/*
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      environment:
        description: 'Deployment environment'
        required: true
        default: 'staging'
        type: choice
        options:
          - staging
          - production

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    outputs:
      artifact-version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
      build-sha: ${{ steps.build-info.outputs.sha }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Generate version
        id: version
        run: |
          VERSION="$(date +'%Y%m%d')-${GITHUB_SHA::8}"
          echo "version=${VERSION}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Capture build info
        id: build-info
        run: |
          echo "sha=${GITHUB_SHA}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --ignore-scripts

      - name: Run linting
        run: npm run lint --if-present

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test --if-present

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build --if-present
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production

      - name: Generate build manifest
        run: |
          cat > build-manifest.json <<EOF
          {
            "version": "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}",
            "commit": "${GITHUB_SHA}",
            "branch": "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}",
            "build_number": "${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}",
            "build_id": "${GITHUB_RUN_ID}",
            "timestamp": "$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"
          }
          EOF
          cp build-manifest.json dist/ 2>/dev/null || cp build-manifest.json .

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
          path: |
            dist/
            build-manifest.json
          retention-days: 5
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Upload deployment scripts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-scripts-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
          path: |
            scripts/deploy/
          retention-days: 5
          if-no-files-found: error

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scan
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    permissions:
      contents: read
      security-events: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-version }}
          path: dist/

      - name: Run npm audit
        run: npm audit --production --audit-level=high
        continue-on-error: false

      - name: Verify build manifest integrity
        run: |
          if [ ! -f dist/build-manifest.json ]; then
            echo "::error::Build manifest not found"
            exit 1
          fi
          MANIFEST_SHA=$(jq -r '.commit' dist/build-manifest.json)
          if [ "${MANIFEST_SHA}" != "${{ needs.build.outputs.build-sha }}" ]; then
            echo "::error::Build manifest SHA mismatch - possible tampering detected"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Build manifest integrity verified"

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build
      - security-scan
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release/')
    permissions:
      contents: read
      deployments: write
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-staging
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-version }}
          path: dist/

      - name: Download deployment scripts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-scripts-${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-version }}
          path: scripts/deploy/

      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        run: |
          if [ ! -f dist/build-manifest.json ]; then
            echo "::error::Build manifest missing from artifacts"
            exit 1
          fi
          MANIFEST_SHA=$(jq -r '.commit' dist/build-manifest.json)
          EXPECTED_SHA="${{ needs.build.outputs.build-sha }}"
          if [ "${MANIFEST_SHA}" != "${EXPECTED_SHA}" ]; then
            echo "::error::Artifact integrity check failed"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Artifact integrity verified: ${MANIFEST_SHA}"

      - name: Validate deployment scripts
        run: |
          DEPLOY_SCRIPT="scripts/deploy/deploy.sh"
          if [ ! -f "${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}" ]; then
            echo "::error::Deployment script not found: ${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}"
            exit 1
          fi
          # Validate script syntax without executing
          bash -n "${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}"
          echo "Deployment script syntax validated"

      - name: Make deployment scripts executable
        run: chmod +x scripts/deploy/*.sh

      - name: Deploy to staging
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: staging
          ARTIFACT_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-version }}
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_HOST }}
        run: |
          echo "Deploying version ${ARTIFACT_VERSION} to staging"
          ./scripts/deploy/deploy.sh \
            --environment "${DEPLOY_ENV}" \
            --version "${ARTIFACT_VERSION}" \
            --artifacts-dir "dist/"

      - name: Run smoke tests
        env:
          STAGING_URL: https://staging.example.com
        run: |
          echo "Running smoke tests against staging..."
          ./scripts/deploy/smoke-test.sh \
            --url "${STAGING_URL}" \
            --version "${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-version }}" \
            --timeout 120

      - name: Notify staging deployment status
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [ "${{ job.status }}" == "success" ]; then
            echo "::notice::Staging deployment successful - version ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-version }}"
          else
            echo "::error::Staging deployment failed - version ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-version }}"
          fi

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build
      - security-scan
      - deploy-staging
    if: |
      (github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.environment == 'production') ||
      startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release/')
    permissions:
      contents: read
      deployments: write
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://www.example.com
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-production
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-version }}
          path: dist/

      - name: Download deployment scripts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-scripts-${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-version }}
          path: scripts/deploy/

      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        run: |
          if [ ! -f dist/build-manifest.json ]; then
            echo "::error::Build manifest missing from artifacts"
            exit 1
          fi
          MANIFEST_SHA=$(jq -r '.commit' dist/build-manifest.json)
          EXPECTED_SHA="${{ needs.build.outputs.build-sha }}"
          if [ "${MANIFEST_SHA}" != "${EXPECTED_SHA}" ]; then
            echo "::error::Artifact integrity check failed - possible supply chain attack"
            exit 1
          fi
          MANIFEST_VERSION=$(jq -r '.version' dist/build-manifest.json)
          EXPECTED_VERSION="${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-version }}"
          if [ "${MANIFEST_VERSION}" != "${EXPECTED_VERSION}" ]; then
            echo "::error::Artifact version mismatch"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Artifact integrity and version verified: ${MANIFEST_SHA} / ${MANIFEST_VERSION}"

      - name: Validate deployment scripts
        run: |
          for script in scripts/deploy/*.sh; do
            bash -n "${script}"
            echo "Validated: ${script}"
          done

      - name: Make deployment scripts executable
        run: chmod +x scripts/deploy/*.sh

      - name: Pre-deployment health check
        env:
          PRODUCTION_URL: https://www.example.com
        run: |
          echo "Running pre-deployment health check..."
          ./scripts/deploy/health-check.sh \
            --url "${PRODUCTION_URL}" \
            --timeout 30

      - name: Deploy to production
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: production
          ARTIFACT_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-version }}
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOST }}
        run: |
          echo "Deploying version ${ARTIFACT_VERSION} to production"
          ./scripts/deploy/deploy.sh \
            --environment "${DEPLOY_ENV}" \
            --version "${ARTIFACT_VERSION}" \
            --artifacts-dir "dist/" \
            --rolling-update \
            --canary-percentage 10

      - name: Run production smoke tests
        env:
          PRODUCTION_URL: https://www.example.com
        run: |
          echo "Running production smoke tests..."
          ./scripts/deploy/smoke-test.sh \
            --url "${PRODUCTION_URL}" \
            --version "${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-version }}" \
            --timeout 180 \
            --strict

      - name: Post-deployment health check
        env:
          PRODUCTION_URL: https://www.example.com
        run: |
          echo "Running post-deployment health check..."
          ./scripts/deploy/health-check.sh \
            --url "${PRODUCTION_URL}" \
            --timeout 60 \
            --expected-version "${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-version }}"

      - name: Rollback on failure
        if: failure()
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: production
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOST }}
        run: |
          echo "::error::Production deployment failed - initiating rollback"
          ./scripts/deploy/rollback.sh \
            --environment "${DEPLOY_ENV}"

      - name: Notify production deployment status
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [ "${{ job.status }}" == "success" ]; then
            echo "::notice::Production deployment successful - version ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-version }}"
          else
            echo "::error::Production deployment failed - version ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-version }}"
          fi

  cleanup:
    name: Cleanup Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build
      - deploy-staging
      - deploy-production
    if: always()
    permissions:
      actions: write
    steps:
      - name: Log pipeline summary
        run: |
          echo "## Deployment Pipeline Summary" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Stage | Status |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "|-------|--------|" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Build | ${{ needs.build.result }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Staging | ${{ needs.deploy-staging.result }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Production | ${{ needs.deploy-production.result }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "**Artifact Version:** ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-version }}" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "**Commit:** ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-sha }}" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
